expectations.text: Reading time uses Jekyll's built-in number_of_words filter rather than a heavy custom plugin
TOC uses kramdown's native {:toc} — does NOT introduce jekyll-toc or unrelated plugins
Restricts the TOC to H2 and H3 (e.g., toc_levels: 2..3 in _config.yml)
Related posts uses a correct tag-overlap algorithm
Does NOT use the invalid {# … #} Liquid comment syntax
States that the code belongs in _layouts/post.html
Either uses tag-overlap manually OR mentions site.related_posts with --lsi cost
